hero.subhead: Unify planning, execution, risk and workforce analytics into a single command center.

capabilities.title: Context, execution and memory — in one place.
capabilities.supporting: Everything a project-driven organization needs to plan, run and remember its work — without switching tools.

charter.title: Charter & governance
charter.desc: Clear objectives, scope and approvals. Every project starts with an auditable charter.

framework.title: Hybrid framework
framework.desc: Agile, Waterfall or fully custom — run each phase in the methodology it actually needs.

memory.title: Living memory
memory.desc: Every decision, risk and approval stays searchable forever. Onboarding takes minutes.

risk.title: Risk radar
risk.desc: Surface risks before they bite. Live exposure scoring across every active project.

workforce.title: Workforce analytics
workforce.desc: Capacity, load and velocity per team. Know who's stretched before they burn out.

executionMap.title: Execution map
executionMap.desc: A live command center across every phase, task and milestone. Full visibility, zero blind spots.

drawing.title: Drawing & BIM intelligence
drawing.desc: Extract quantities and takeoffs from drawings and BIM models automatically — no manual counting.

import.title: Import from anywhere
import.desc: Bring existing projects in from Excel, CSV, JSON, Word or PDF in minutes — AI structures the work for you.

living.title: Living projects
living.desc: Tasks, milestones and dependencies stay connected in a living graph that updates as work moves.

methodology.title: One framework. Every methodology your projects need.

stats.traceability: average traceability across active programs in private beta.
stats.decisions: decisions captured and kept searchable in living memory.
stats.blindspots: blind spots. Risk, capacity and status in a single command center.

pricing.title: Simple pricing that
pricing.subtitle: Pay per internal user. External stakeholders always participate for free.

personal.name: Personal
personal.desc: For validating projects, students or founders.

team.name: Team
team.desc: For startups and small teams with shared visibility.

business.name: Business / PMO
business.desc: For serious teams that need governance and intelligence.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For regulated companies and large rollouts.

ai.title: Your project judgment.
ai.lead: ProjectOps 360° is built for project managers who want more than task tracking.
ai.body: AI works across the system to help you define scope, structure work, detect risk, summarize communication, preserve project memory, and recommend the next best action.
ai.noReplace: But AI does not replace your expertise.
ai.sharper: It gives you better visibility, faster analysis, and stronger decision support — so your judgment becomes sharper, not less important.
ai.closing: ProjectOps 360° helps you lead projects with intelligence, control, and confidence.

quote.pre: “We replaced four tools with one. For the first time, leadership and delivery are looking at the
quote.name: Daniela Ortiz

cta.desc: Join the teams running planning, execution and risk from a single command center.
